# UV Photocatalysis

**Summary**: A process using UV light and a semiconductor catalyst to degrade organic pollutants.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2013-muhyedeen|Muhyedeen, 2013]] used uv-photocatalysis to degrade MTBE in water samples.

## Instruments and Software



## Typical Workflow



## Key Results and Findings

- TiO2 showed the highest removal rates for MTBE across all UV intensities, with removal reaching up to 95% at certain conditions. ([[2013-muhyedeen|Muhyedeen, 2013, p. 49]])
